title: Sanji’s Group Saved the Minks
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on sanji’s group saved the minks within the Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...!! s... so the ones that attacked this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: correct. How they managed to arrive at our island... or why they thought

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: There would be a Samurai here... these are things we still do not understand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "But being all happy- go-lucky, can't you be a little more sensitive about the situation?!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The words "Samurai" and "Wano Country" are taboo here, don't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That Kim'Emon was talking about isn't here... what a bummer!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: By "Ninja"... Do you mean a Wano Country Warrior?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Is your crew privy to something that we are not?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No, no, not at all!!! ...er... inja ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We were wondering how the injured are doing....!!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Ah, we're almost at the Duke's sanatorium, as you can see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I apologize for making you come all this way...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We can continue this discussion later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My deepest apologies, Sir Soci- Lian....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lord Sicilian!? What has you so dis-ressed?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No one here is showing any backbone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Kindness, love, affection, babies, sugar and honey!! Do not ever talk about anything sweet in my presence!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll tear your windpipes out!!! Now get back up here on your own!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So strict... but yet... so cool ...

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: member of the 3 inuarashi musketers inUarashi musketeeter squad captain (lion milk) FULL-POWER SICILIAN

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Our apologies!! We will never talk about anything sweet, ever again!!

summary: Sanji’s Group Saved the Minks: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
